name: Ice Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the crumb crust and set aside.
2. Place the ice cream in a large mixing bowl and cut it into squares.
3. Microwave at 10% (low) for 2 1/2 - 3 1/2 minutes, or until softened. If your oven does not have a 10% setting, use 30% (medium-low).
4. Add the cream de menthe, semi-sweet baking chocolate, and half of the crushed peppermint candy to the bowl. Beat at medium speed until smooth.
5. Spoon the mixture into the prepared crust.
6. Sprinkle with the remaining crushed peppermint candy.
7. Freeze for about 5 hours, or until firm.
